sectiondef.header: Multi-Function Pin Controller (MPC) Definitions for Renesas RX SoCs.

briefdescription.para: Bit position of the port number field.
Mask for the port number field.
Bit position of the pin number field.
Mask for the pin number field.
Bit position of the Peripheral Select (PSEL) field.
Mask for the Peripheral Select (PSEL) field.

sectiondef.header: Renesas RX MPC Port 0 Pin Function Select codes (PSEL values)
Renesas RX MPC Port 1 Pin Function Select codes (PSEL values)
Renesas RX MPC Port 3 Pin Function Select codes (PSEL values)
Renesas RX MPC Port 5 Pin Function Select codes (PSEL values)
Renesas RX MPC Port A Pin Function Select codes (PSEL values)
Renesas RX MPC Port B Pin Function Select codes (PSEL values)
Renesas RX MPC Port C Pin Function Select codes (PSEL values)
Renesas RX MPC Port D Pin Function Select codes (PSEL values)
Renesas RX MPC Port E Pin Function Select codes (PSEL values)
Renesas RX MPC Port H Pin Function Select codes (PSEL values)

briefdescription.para: Macro to encode a pin configuration for Renesas RX SoCs.

detaileddescription.para: This macro encodes the mode, peripheral selection (PSEL), port number, and pin number into a single 32-bit value suitable for use in DeviceTree pinctrl configurations.

briefdescription.para: Renesas RX pin control (pinctrl) definitions for Zephyr.

detaileddescription.para: This header provides macro constants for encoding pin function selections and pin indices for Renesas RX SoCs. These values are used by the DeviceTree pinctrl subsystem to describe peripheral pin mappings.
